_comment: TermiVoxed TTS status + self-update manifest. Served free at https://lxusbrain.com/tts-status.json (Vite public/ -> GitHub Pages). Edit this file to (a) warn users during an edge-tts outage via 'banner', and (b) point the in-app updater at a known-good edge-tts wheel via edge_tts.recommended_version + wheels[]. PUBLISH: edit -> bump, then run `npm run deploy`. Phase 3 adds an Ed25519 'signature' (same TERMIVOXED_UPDATE_PUBLIC_KEY as the app auto-updater) over the canonical JSON of this object minus the signature field; until then the app treats it as unverified/advisory and will NOT auto-download code from it.
